description:
A holographic system control deck for Windows. One machine, three modes.

NeonPrime is a holographic system control deck for Windows: a more powerful, better-looking take on the all-in-one tweak-and-debloat utility. Monitor live telemetry, apply reversible tweaks and debloat backed by a rollback history, switch system modes and power plans, manage processes, services, startup, and the firewall, score and harden your privacy, clean caches and browser data, and build a debloated Windows ISO with MicroWin. On top sits a full IT and helpdesk toolkit: compliance and posture, one-click support bundles, event logs, local users, printers, disks, drivers, certificates, and Group Policy. All from a single cyan-and-ember HUD.
